content.rendered:
EXCELLENT  
 
 12 reviews on
 
 
 
 
  
 
 
 
  
 
 
 Sara M 
 
2024-08-21
 
 
  
 
Amee is an incredibly skilled photographer and was amazing to work with, from start to finish. She is honestly everything you would want in a wedding photographer and our experience working with her was truly the best! Amee is warm and friendly and brought a fun and happy energy to both our engagement shoot and wedding day which made us both feel so comfortable in front of the camera and more importantly, enjoy the process! Amee delivered over 50 photos the morning after our wedding and captured our love beautifully. On the wedding day, she amazed us by how many places she could be in at once, and we loved watching her creativity shine. Amee is not only an incredible photographer but also a wonderful person and we are so thankful to have worked with her. I would highly recommend Amee to anyone looking for photography!!
  
 
 
  
 
 
 
  
 
 
 Lo W 
 
2023-11-20
 
 
  
 
I wish there were more stars in a rating! Amee was incredible to work with. We hired her for our wedding and also had engagement photos done. Right away she was prompt in getting back to me and I really appreciate how organized she was. Her relaxed and friendly demeanour made both my partner and I feel completely at ease during the photoshoots and her playfulness allowed for us to lean into our goofy side which made for really genuine photos. We have had so many compliments from our wedding guests regarding her photos as well as her lovely personality. I highly recommend working with her. Thanks Amee!
  
 
 
  
 
 
 
  
 
 
 anette yanken 
 
2023-11-01
 
 
  
 
Incredible talent, style, and personality - Amee was perfect at our wedding! We would pick her every time! She captured our story and love forever in the most beautiful way. She’s a true artist. She made us feel comfortable and confident throughout the process - we are quite shy so we really appreciated the extra support. She was super professional and made the best of the little time we had at our intimate wedding. She was also kind and understanding that we didn’t want to share our photos publicly. 10/10 Highly recommend! I want to print and hang every shot! Thank you Amee!
  
 
 
  
 
 
 
  
 
 
 Katie Antonsen 
 
2023-09-13
 
 
  
 
We found Amee after doing some research online, looking through her work and falling in love with her style of photos. She was absolutely amazing from start to finish! When I tell you this women moves at the speed of light, I am not kidding, she is everywhere all at once. She showed up incredibly prepared to the wedding day and had already mapped out where we would take photos. She found places that my fiancé and I never would have thought of and the photos turned out breathtaking. She was fun, smiling, and had a great attitude the entire time. I would recommend Amee to anyone looking for a very personable photographer who knows her stuff!
  
 
 
  
 
 
 
  
 
 
 Chelsea Laine 
 
2023-09-09
 
 
  
 
I honestly cannot sum up into words how incredible Amee was to work with. From the minute we first met her for our engagement photos, she made us feel so comfortable. She was always extremely kind and bubbly to be around. On the day of the wedding she arrived early to scan our venue and she helped organize my family/wedding party for our bigger photos so seamlessly. She captured every single moment that I had on my wish list and more. Amee delivered us a sneak peak two days after our wedding with nearly 100 photos and we were blown away by her talent. When she delivered the full album we were in awe and still find new favourites every time we look at them. Her photos are warm and timeless, she is incredible at her job and will make you feel so comfortable in front of the camera.
  
 
 
  
 
 
 
  
 
 
 Emma Thomson 
 
2023-09-06
 
 
  
 
Absolutely amazing. Words cannot describe how wonderful Amee and her photographs are. We hired her for our engagement and wedding after seeing photos that she took for a family members wedding.   Her photographs are absolutely stunning and she made us feel extremely comfortable during the shoots and she is a lovely, kind person to spend time with. We had so much fun during the engagement shoot and on the wedding day. Looking back at the photos bring us so much joy and happiness.  Thank you Amee :)
  
 
 
  
 
 
 
  
 
 
 Hilary Mathieson 
 
2022-08-26
 
 
  
 
Working with Amee was an absolute dream! She captured our engagement shoot and wedding day and did an incredible job of both. She did a great job of interpreting our personal style and energy and turned it into some stunning photography. Couldn’t recommend her enough!
  
 
 
  
 
 
 
  
 
 
 Katie Tatham Paxson 
 
2021-09-20
 
 
  
 
Amee is a talented photographer with a great eye and amazing presence. She was awesome on our wedding day, bringing a big smile and positive attitude throughout. Our wedding was very small and intimate and Amee fit right in. The photos she captured are so beautiful and we will cherish them forever.
We loved working with Amee and were so grateful that she was part of our celebration. Without a doubt we would love for her to photograph special occasions in the future.
  
 
 
  
 
 
 
  
 
 
 Emily Dame 
 
2021-08-28
 
 
  
 
If you are looking for a photographer to beautifully capture the heart and soul of your wedding, then Amee is the best choice. She is so sweet and fun to work with. Her style of photography is a magical blend of modern, dreamy, moody, and effortlessness. She really captures the pure joy we felt on our wedding day. She is very attentive with correspondence and her prices are far too reasonable for her talent. Trust me, stop looking for other photographers and book with Amee before its too late.
  
 
 
  
 
 
 
  
 
 
 Annika van Roy 
 
2020-11-12
 
 
  
 
Amee was the photographer for our super intimate elopement this past July, and I could not imagine having had anybody else there to capture the moments.

She is fun, warm and oh so talented! She made us feel at ease and the photos from the day were incredible. She captured all the magic and all the smiles, and I’m so grateful we have her beautiful photos to remember the day forever. Highly recommend!
  
 
 
  
 
 
Load more
